records.context: PR #4101: extracted SharedMenu from three channel menus

replies: Reverted. 'SharedMenu' tells me nothing about what it is, and it only fit after adding four config props. The duplication was cheaper.

records.context: PR #4108: extracted useChannelDraft hook shared by composer and thread
PR #4115: merged two formatters that looked alike but served posts vs files

replies: These format different domain concepts (post text vs file size). Merging them coupled unrelated code; please keep them separate next time.
